repairs.summary: Scoped the source registry to Alexandria; rebuilt 122 current food and nonalcoholic products across 12 sections; removed six fragments and nine Annapolis-only rows; consolidated repeated owner, Toast, brunch, and late-night presentations; restored 71 omitted products; applied the global gluten cross-contact warning; and introduced restaurant-linked source types so Toast evidence is not mislabeled official.

notes: Targeted catalog and frozen-reconciliation tests passed: 8/8.
The first generated regression exposed three verified mocktails being rejected by a generic drink-only classifier; a restaurant-scoped exception now preserves the current nonalcoholic rows.
